title: Wayfindr
description: A minecraft waypoints mod. Not all who wander are lost, but you certainly are. Let's fix that.
body:
Wayfindr lets you add waypoints in the game world so you can keep track of points of interest you might come across. If you're like me, you're just tired of getting lost trying to get back home after exploring.

Wayfindr currently supports:
- sharing waypoints between players on a server
- navigating to a selected waypoint
- showing/hiding waypoints
- optional death waypoint

The default keys to get started are "n" for quickly adding a waypoint at the crosshair location and "m" for accessing the waypoints manager to manage your waypoints.
